Text:
Guardare all'Italia per vedere come la pericolosa idea di "remigrazione" sta prendendo piede in Europa

siamo sempre all'avanguardia

www.theguardian.com/commentisfre...

Links.Title: Look to Italy to see how the dangerous idea of ‘remigration’ is taking root in Europe | David Broder
Links.Description: To even be talking about this drastic deportation policy is a sign the far right is winning, says author David Broder

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post serves as a critical, ironic commentary on the rise of exclusionary political ideologies. It reflects a high concern for societal security and equality by highlighting the danger of 'remigration' policies, and implicitly advocates for tolerance by labeling these ideas as dangerous. The author takes the responsibility of a public intellectual to warn against the erosion of democratic norms.

Text: Negata sala convegni al comitato di estrema destra 'Remigrazione'

Links.Title: Negata sala convegni al comitato di estrema destra 'Remigrazione' - Notizie - Ansa.it
Links.Description: Proprietaria hotel: 'Hanno avuto un modo ingannevole di comportarsi' (ANSA)

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The hotel owner exercises independent action and power by denying space to a group whose ideology conflicts with their reputation and values. This reflects a commitment to societal security and lawfulness by distancing the business from controversial political movements, while implicitly prioritizing social responsibility over absolute tolerance.

Text:
"Via dall'Italia 3,3 milioni di persone". Il think tank dei supporter della remigrazione quantifica i numeri della deportazione
www.huffingtonpost.it/politica/202...

Links.Title: "Via dall'Italia 3,3 milioni di persone". Il think tank dei supporter della remigrazione quantifica i numeri della deportazione - HuffPost Italia
Links.Description: Per la prima volta il White Paper Policy Institute, think tank legato all'estrema destra americana, quantifica le persone che dovrebbero essere allontanate…

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post discusses a policy proposal for mass deportation, which reflects a strong focus on Societal Security (as defined by the proponents) and Power, while implicitly challenging Tolerance and Equality. It touches on Tradition through the lens of national identity, and Lawfulness regarding state control, but lacks any expression of caring or respect for the individuals affected.

Text:
#persone #remigrazione #Vannacci #fascismo #deportazione
Se il delirio si perde in un buco sempre più profondo, sempre più nero.
Oggi per @mm-repubblica-bot.bsky.social

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post uses metaphorical language to critique political discourse surrounding 'remigration' and fascism. It reflects a concern for Societal Security, Equality, and Tolerance by condemning exclusionary ideologies. The reference to 'delirium' suggests a call for rational, independent thought against extremist rhetoric, while the implicit defense of human rights aligns with a sense of social responsibility.

Text:
Eccoli, più fascisti dei fascisti. 

Il Foglio scrive che la Lega sarebbe prossima a presentare una proposta di legge sulla “remigrazione”: il testo mira al rimpatrio, anche forzato, dei migranti, inclusi quelli regolari, con incentivi al rientro e misure contro chi ha commesso reati.

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post is a critical commentary on a proposed political policy. It reflects Lawfulness and Societal Security through the lens of state-mandated migration control, while highlighting a clash of values regarding Tradition and the exclusion of others, which fundamentally opposes the concept of Tolerance.

Text: La contestata proposta di legge di iniziativa popolare sulla “remigrazione” ha raggiunto le 50 mila firme per essere presentata in Parlamento. Ecco che cosa prevede:

Links.Title: Remigrazione: che cosa prevede la proposta di legge di iniziativa popolare
Links.Description: Dopo il blocco della conferenza stampa alla Camera, il testo ha superato le 50 mila firme e sarà presentato in...

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post describes a political initiative focused on 'remigration,' which reflects a desire to exert control over societal composition (Power/Societal Security) through formal legislative channels (Lawfulness). The achievement of 50,000 signatures highlights a collective effort to influence policy, rooted in a traditionalist or nationalist framework (Tradition). It lacks focus on individual caring or equality, instead prioritizing a specific vision of state order.

Text:
📢 La cittadinanza non si eredita: si conquista.
💬 #ReImmigrazione è il modello per costruire un'appartenenza reale.
Scopri di più 👉 www.reimmigrazione.com
#Remigrazione #Integrazione #PoliticheMigratorie

Links.Title: Integrazione o ReImmigrazione
Links.Description: Serve un nuovo paradigma: ‘Integrazione o ReImmigrazione’. Perché l’immigrazione non è un diritto, l’integrazione è un dovere

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post advocates for a restrictive, meritocratic view of citizenship ('conquered, not inherited') and emphasizes societal stability through the exclusion or removal of those who do not conform to a specific national identity. It prioritizes societal security and traditionalist definitions of belonging over tolerance or equality, framing integration as a rigid duty rather than a mutual social process.

Text:
"mentre la classe media combatte una guerra immaginaria per difendere la razza o la mascolinità contro la "grande sostituzione”, l'oligarchia acquisisce gli asset reali del pianeta"

#musk #thiel

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post offers a critical sociological analysis of class dynamics and resource concentration. It highlights the disparity between ideological 'culture wars' (distractions) and the material reality of wealth accumulation by the elite (oligarchy). It strongly emphasizes Wealth and Power as the drivers of inequality, while reflecting a critical, independent perspective on societal structures.

Text:
#Trump ha ragione, è ora di rimandare a casa tutti gli immigrati, hanno ormai invaso tutta l’America
#immigrazione

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: The post reflects a desire for societal security and lawfulness through the lens of exclusionary nationalism. It prioritizes the perceived safety and stability of the 'in-group' over tolerance or equality, framing immigration as a threat to the established order.

Text:
Ai vari Barbero,
Travaglio,  Salvini,Conte , Di Battista, Orsini e
 tutta la loro marmaglia di sostenitori auguro notti tormentate dalle anime di queste vittime... 
Meglio ancora sarebbe fargli provare  l' ebrezza di essere inseguiti da un drone russo 🤬

ValueAnalysis.Reasoning: As a sociologist observing the 'paradox of choice' and the erosion of social character, I find this post deeply concerning. It reflects a total collapse of civil discourse. The author expresses intense hostility and a desire for retributive suffering (wishing torment and fear upon others), which is the antithesis of the values of respect, tolerance, and societal security. It does not promote any constructive social concept; rather, it highlights the 'tyranny of opinion' where polarization replaces empathy, leaving no room for the nuanced deliberation necessary for a healthy society.
